The Automation Accelerator
This tutorial is solely aimed at ADVANCED advertisers that are looking for support and
guidance with creating automated rules and alerts to support growth. There's a high risk
of loss of revenue and spend if you get the rules wrong so proceed with caution!!
I use Revealbot for automation and alerts - you can grab 30% off for the first 6 months
through this affiliate link - for transparency if you use that link I receive a small
commission from Revealbot for referring you on. Feel free not to use the link if you don't
wish to use the affiliate link or the promotional offer.
Note: I would never recommend a tool or software unless I was 100% certain of its quality
